overview.description: The AllianzIM Growth-100 Buffer5 ETF (QBQV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims to track the share price returns of the Invesco QQQ Trust (ticker: QQQ) up to a cap, while buffering the first 5% decline, over a three-month outcome period. The actively managed fund holds FLEX options. QBQV was launched on Mar 31, 2026 and is issued by Allianz.
